name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: The final time this month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki for Congress
body:
Hi friend,

I know you've heard a lot from me and my team lately as the chaos consuming Washington continues. It means a lot to me that I have your continued support.

That being said, my finance director tells me we're running slightly short of our April digital fundraising goal with just hours before the deadline. Just 5 donations from 18326 would hit the mark.

**If you've been waiting for the right time to give, this is it.**

So if, and only if, you're able – $3 would make an immediate impact on our ability to hold the line in IL-13 and do our part in making a Democratic majority a reality.

Nikki

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: No time to waste ahead of the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It seems like every election is framed as the most important we've faced.
But with the attacks on our democracy and our fundamental right to vote, especially in the wake of the Supreme Court's decisions that dismantle the Voting Rights Act, the importance of the midterms cannot be understated .
We have no time to waste. Chip in $35 or more right now to defend our fundamental right to vote! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=043026_4&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Team
The Constitution places the authority to run elections squarely with the states and Congress – NOT with the federal government.
But now, the President has issued another executive order imposing sweeping new federal control over election administration.
Make no mistake, Team, this is yet another unlawful attempt by this MAGA administration to sow confusion and distrust ahead of the fall midterm elections.
We're doing everything in our power to fight back and protect the right to vote , including:
➜ Registering eligible voters
➜ Putting election information directly in the hands of voters
➜ Combating election misinformation
➜ Advocating at every level to keep our elections truly free and fair
Team, it will take massive resources to stand up to this new executive order in time to make a difference before the midterm elections. We need your help ASAP: Will you chip in $35 or whatever you can afford right now? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=043026_4&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=043026_4&amount=35]
The executive order purports to address “non-citizen voting.”
States, however, already have proven systems in place to verify voter eligibility, non-citizen voting is already a federal crime, and instances are vanishingly rare.
Rather than solving a real problem, this order manufactures one to justify granting this administration unprecedented authority over a process which the Constitution clearly delegates to the states and to Congress.
It's simple: This executive order is dangerous, unlawful, and harmful to voters.
We will never stay silent when the right to vote is attacked, Team, including by a hostile administration in control of the federal government.
If you’re with us, please chip in $35 or whatever you can to fuel our work empowering voters ahead of the 2026 elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=043026_4&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=043026_4&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=043026_4&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=lZSG15yU69uBdaDViBsV7bygZFzA311pCfkyvT3%2BjNDniebkra7a%2BhA6b6ExiGWJdFDQwt04kFdSeFT9fJRFKv9oVoi91697Iy5Werg98tSbHnpnyX7OhoMlqLxbcrJ8vRAtUeD4%2FPGbQz9K%2BVAxcjXurnnc69pHkwf8RPA4udIDu1sHfRUNfBQyEz8UPowq6yBS5jWtYjYvgpZT72oKa3mLj2q4y%2FhE0CTRKqaU%2FHugZOiUd4xkoFIgETLhrSIAnGGFivdVWtjf9lB7ptmAW%2F1PQYyH1p2%2BQ9XsFnCbFR3EXCY%2BSI%2Fv%2FhWORKmAKgOQkTGJ5ywllq09q4JjTKu6BBpJs3SgQvTlA2ICtrWNdR0YitDWbPZYEabQQXC7EUxt9KVD3V4mbqEcZQ7bcBmuiAs0ho5tpwIKMZU5ghnLfnQ%3D .

If we miss this goal, we lose the momentum we need to keep counter these attacks, defend our seats, and take back the House. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for being in this with us! — Marie, Vicente, and Adam * If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . subject: What this Supreme Court ruling means for democracy

body:
This ruling is shameful. But we aren’t wallowing in defeat. We’re ready to respond.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517404/618007608/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkOWM0ZWI0LWYwNDQtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c1BOGoJE-0VmoWen65WCmbnXtmzDJ7yFjnHunQVkOHk=&emci=50c5b716-cf44-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=0d9c4eb4-f044-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)

Devastating news, Peter: The Supreme Court just dealt a major blow to the Voting Rights Act. The Voting Rights Act has been a pillar of American democracy since 1965 — providing critical protections that generations of Americans put their lives on the line for so that every voter, no matter their race or ZIP code, gets to have a voice in our democracy. **This ruling will have seismic effects on the ability of communities of color to be represented in the halls of power.** We are heartbroken and angry, but we aren’t wallowing in defeat. We’ve been preparing for this outcome and we aren’t wasting a single moment getting ready for the fight ahead. As you read this, Republicans in states across the country—and especially in the South— are plotting to use and misuse this ruling in efforts to throw out their maps and draw minority opportunity districts out of existence. **Let’s be clear: We _can_ stop them, and the NDRC has a plan to fight back. We’re prepared to use every tool at our disposal — mobilizing voters, putting pressure on lawmakers, and electing fair-minded public officials — to protect the voting rights of all Americans. ** [**Rush in your emergency donation to help NDRC respond to this crisis for democracy. Your support has never been more crucial than in this moment, and we greatly appreciate it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517405/618007609/1630712388?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_CallaisRRNOR_email_20260430-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisRRNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260430-NDRC-Tier1-CallaisRRNOR_&utm_campaign=CallaisRRNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkOWM0ZWI0LWYwNDQtZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=c1BOGoJE-0VmoWen65WCmbnXtmzDJ7yFjnHunQVkOHk=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

After the ruling, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis wasted no time in pushing through a new extreme gerrymander — saying openly that the Supreme Court has given them cover to do so. We know other Republican-held states could quickly follow suit — and the result could be a tsunami of extreme gerrymanders and district lines that attempt to silence American voters.
Now that this ruling has come down, some experts believe that Republicans could redraw maps to steal **more congressional seats** in the months ahead. Put simply, if you thought that Donald Trump’s manufactured redistricting crisis was bad already, buckle up for what’s next.
How we respond in moments like this will determine the future of our democracy and fairness in America. And we simply cannot fail that test.

We’re just six hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re currently $1,598 short of our goal. The good news? name: Randy Villegas
subject: Did I catch you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress
body:
Peter, I’ll keep this quick:

Growing up, my dad used to say you finish what you start. I’ve been thinking about that a lot as we head into the final days of this campaign.

We set a goal of raising $40,000 in online contributions before we close out the month. It's what we need to stay on the air and expand our reach as mail-in ballots drop across California next week.

**We're doing well, but we’re $7,631 short. Can you help us finish strong by chipping in $3 today? I hope you understand I'm only asking because it's critical to our campaign.**

Here's the link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q2-2026?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517565/618008491/701031031?refcode=em-4.30.26-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2ZTY4ZmYtZjA0NC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r0tIDIokNwJhw9vrN0O-Z26Frt02hui5PApnrUc4_qA=)**

The far-right Super PACs are going to flood this race with millions without even sweating it. They don't have to. But we do — because this campaign runs entirely on real people like you and me, not corporate donors or special interests.

I'm counting on you to finish strong. So if you can, chip in $3 before midnight to help us close the gap: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rvfc-em-q2-2026?refcode=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517568/618008496/701031031?refcode=em-4.30.26-all-2-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiY2U2ZTY4ZmYtZjA0NC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r0tIDIokNwJhw9vrN0O-Z26Frt02hui5PApnrUc4_qA=)**

I can't thank you enough,

Randy

PO Box 1346
Visalia, CA 93279
United States

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517712/618009422/1231236074?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.04.30_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzY3MDgyMC1mMTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CX669g2nKNQs32mknydcslBibmw10BIGJnT-KK98P6g=&emci=03f6b53d-c544-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=4c670820-f144-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=23483442) | Everyone hates asking for money, Peter. I know I do. **But this end-of-month deadline is about so much more than just one campaign.** My team and I are standing up to my MAGA opponents, but we’re also working around the clock to make sure we can flip the seats necessary to win back the House in November. **So I’ll ask for money if it means we stand a fighting chance at taking back the House so that we can deliver real, meaningful legislation for folks at home in Washington.** I’m asking for money because flipping the House means we can get people back on affordable healthcare plans, we can combat rising costs, and we can put an end to this war that nobody asked for. **_[Can you pitch in $6 or more before midnight to help us meet our April fundraising goal and keep us on track to flipping the House this November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517713/618009423/1131826177?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.04.30_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzY3MDgyMC1mMTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CX669g2nKNQs32mknydcslBibmw10BIGJnT-KK98P6g=)_** [DONATE $6](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130517714/618009424/1131826177?amount=6&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2026.04.30_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzY3MDgyMC1mMTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CX669g2nKNQs32mknydcslBibmw10BIGJnT-KK98P6g=) Your support makes all the difference. Thank you. — Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. clean_body: | Everyone hates asking for money, Peter. I know I do. But this end-of-month deadline is about so much more than just one campaign. My team and I are standing up to my MAGA opponents, but we’re also working around the clock to make sure we can flip the seats necessary to win back the House in November. So I’ll ask for money if it means we stand a fighting chance at taking back the House so that we can deliver real, meaningful legislation for folks at home in Washington. I’m asking for money because flipping the House means we can get people back on affordable healthcare plans, we can combat rising costs, and we can put an end to this war that nobody asked for. = = Your support makes all the difference. Thank you. — Emily | | Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. She grew up in a working-class Union household in Port Orchard and was the first in her family to attend college. After serving in the State Senate and passing nearly 200 bills, Emily made history in 2024 as the first queer Latina elected to Congress. Now, Emily is fighting for WA working families in D.C. and organizing to take back the House. Can you chip in $6 or any amount and join our team? = Want to maximize your impact?Become a monthly donor to help us flip the House from red to blue! = Follow on: | | | | | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Don’t sit this one out, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260430-2215-foote&t=1001&akid=2215%2E342411%2EiXQoVc ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’re coming up on our [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260430-movement.TMWc_Y&refcode=em20260430-2215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2215%2E342411%2EiXQoVc ]end-of-month deadline, and this one is about
something we think a lot of people are feeling right now: whether
collective action is still powerful enough to beat what we’re up against.

While most people are trying to pay rent, get to work, and take care of
their families, the people at the top are still pushing the same agenda:
scare immigrants, gut voting rights, and keep power locked up where it
already is.

But we’ve seen what actually happens on the ground.

When people organize together, when neighbors look out for each other,
when movements refuse to let go — that’s when things shift. That’s when
power starts to move in a different direction.

That belief is why each member of the Squad ran for Congress in the first
place. And it’s still the reason they show up every day.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan and Rashida didn’t come here through the usual
pipeline. They came through organizing, protests, community meetings, and
all the messy, hopeful work of people trying to make things better
together.

And the Squad doesn’t take corporate PAC money. They don’t want their
decisions shaped anywhere but the communities we come from.

The Squad Victory Fund is one way we keep that collective work going — not
as individuals trying to hold on, but as part of a larger movement
building power together. It helps defend our seats and keep the fight for
progressive change strong.

But none of that works if people sit it out. So we’re asking you:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260430-movement.TMWc_Y&refcode=em20260430-2215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1003&akid=2215%2E342411%2EiXQoVc ]Will you chip in $3 ahead of tonight’s midnight deadline
to help us keep showing up, standing up, and driving change where it’s
needed most?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260430-movement.TMWc_Y&refcode=em20260430-2215&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=2215%2E342411%2EiXQoVc ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

Team SVF

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2215%2E342411%2EiXQoVc

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Democrats.org
subject: The most strategic donation you can make
body:
---
Derek, if you’ve been looking for the most strategic donation you can make during the 2026 midterm elections, this is it. Here’s why your $7 goes furthest when you [**donate to the DNC:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6947_fr&refcode2=6947_22930333_IP-5Hf&akid=6947%2E22930333%2EIP-5Hf) We are the _only_ committee focused on electing Democrats at every single level of government. That includes candidates for your local school board, Democrats running in Pennsylvania, and beyond. It’s our job to send money to candidates who would benefit from that funding the most. And there’s more: Across the country, we’re working hard to reach Democrats who don't vote in every election — our voters — people who will help us win if they show up at the polls in November. Think about the friends or relatives you have who are Democrats but who don't always vote. There are millions of people like them across the country, and traditionally, getting them to show up in a midterm year is even tougher. If we can persuade them to vote in November’s elections, we can win the midterms. [**That’s exactly how we’ll put that $7 contribution to work: Reaching voters. Investing in campaigns where more funding can make a huge difference. Putting Democrats in the best possible position to take back Congress this fall, and ultimately, the White House. If this is important to you, we’re asking you to make that contribution now:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6947_fr&refcode2=6947_22930333_IP-5Hf&akid=6947%2E22930333%2EIP-5Hf) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6947_fr&refcode2=6947_22930333_IP-5Hf&akid=6947%2E22930333%2EIP-5Hf)**

If we reach our April fundraising goal, we’ll have the resources we’ll need to scale up all of this work. That’s why your support before midnight makes such a big difference.
Thank you in advance for your help,
The Democrats

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Hello,
**My name is Eileen Laubacher, and I am the Democrat and retired U.S. Navy Rear Admiral running against Lauren Boebert here in Colorado.**
I was 17-years-old the first time I raised my right hand and took an oath to support and defend the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
I took those words, and that responsibility, seriously every day for the next 4 decades. When I was an intelligence officer. When I was deployed to Afghanistan. When I became an Admiral. And as a member of the president’s National Security Council.
But in all those years, I have never felt as much of a threat to our country, our Constitution, and our very democracy as I do right now. I said I would never run for office. But in this moment, I feel an obligation to step up, serve my community, and defend our country once again.
**I am running for Congress to defeat Lauren Boebert because when she was sworn into office, Lauren took a similar oath to defend our Constitution – and she has betrayed it almost every single day since then.**
Adam Frisch only lost to Lauren Boebert by 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country. We can finally put an end to Lauren Boebert’s embarrassing political career – but I need your help now to do it.
Our campaign needs to raise another $5,000 before our deadline at midnight to defeat Lauren Boebert and take back the House for Democrats, but right now, we’re still short. **If I am going to send Lauren Boebert packing and flip this seat blue, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in right now to my campaign:**
[**Please, will you make a monthly donation right now – every single dollar you can afford to give today – to help me defeat Lauren Boebert, flip this seat blue, and take back the House for Democrats? I am not accepting money from corporate PACs like Boebert is, so no amount you can give is too small.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130518184/618016638/156431970?refcode=20260430pm-nd&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTgxNzIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjFmMDUzNjctZjI0NC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=BWyCgX900D6VgxKnYoZx_Kmsyd9z7myzehIWQiK3E2M=)

name: James Talarico HQ
subject: just $1 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
This morning, we weren’t sure we would make it, but after a surge of support, we are incredibly close to our April fundraising goal.
If enough people make their first online donation before midnight, we’ll get there. So we’re lowering our ask:
**[Please use this link to add your donation of $1 (or more!) before midnight. Every dollar puts us one step closer to sending James Talarico to the U.S. Senate.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260430-2-ak&t=1&akid=609%2E1347274%2E7fBd5H)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260430-2-ak&t=2&akid=609%2E1347274%2E7fBd5H)
It may feel like $1 doesn’t make a difference when billionaires and corporate mega-donors can launder limitless dark money into Texas. But that is the power of a grassroots movement. Together, we can pull off a feat as historic as ending 30 years of one-party rule in Texas.
$1 because we need to hire more staff and organize massive voter outreach efforts in every corner of Texas.
$1 because super PACs and national Republicans are launching new false attacks against James every day.
$1 because _The Economist_ just ranked Texas’ U.S. Senate seat as one of the three most likely to flip in November.

clean_body: Peter — This morning, we weren’t sure we would make it, but after a surge of support, we are incredibly close to our April fundraising goal. If enough people make their first online donation before midnight, we’ll get there. So we’re lowering our ask: It may feel like $1 doesn’t make a difference when billionaires and corporate mega-donors can launder limitless dark money into Texas. But that is the power of a grassroots movement. Together, we can pull off a feat as historic as ending 30 years of one-party rule in Texas. $1 because we need to hire more staff and organize massive voter outreach efforts in every corner of Texas. $1 because super PACs and national Republicans are launching new false attacks against James every day. $1 because The Economist just ranked Texas’ U.S. Senate seat as one of the three most likely to flip in November. Team Talarico Paid for by Talarico for Texas Talarico for Texas PO Box 14508 Austin, TX 78761

A donation to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC goes directly toward electing the climate and democracy champions who will fight for the future we all deserve. In solidarity, xx Jane Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address and sometimes takes a few days to update. If you have donated — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting JanePAC. | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
#

Hey Peter, I know you already heard from me today – and I don’t want to take up any more of your time – so I’ll keep this quick.
In case you missed it, earlier I asked members of this grassroots team to chip in before our campaign’s April fundraising deadline passes at midnight tonight.
Well, I have some good news and some bad news.
The bad news is that our deadline is going to pass at midnight, and we’re still coming up short.
The good news is that we’re really just inches away, and I know I can count on this team to push us over the line.

name: Laura Friedman (personal)
subject: Are you still around?
body:
Good evening, friend.
I know you’ve heard from me and my team quite a bit over the past couple of days. However, midnight tonight marks an important fundraising deadline as we close in on the June 2 primary.
And let's be clear: my least favorite part about campaigning for Congress is fundraising. And I don't believe for a second that money alone decides elections -- we proved that last election with our grassroots community, out-performing many corporate and self-funders.
But after Prop 50 passed, every district changed a little bit, and it's important we keep up the resources we need to reach out to new and undecided voters before they receive their ballots.
Every dollar translates into more ads deployed and more mail pieces sent out. But more importantly, your donation sends an important message that CA-30 is the bastion for true progressive leadership in our state.
So if you can, please chip in $3, or anything you can, to help us hit the ground running when ballots drop.

body:
We’re just HOURS away from our deadline, so I’ll be quick.

| Peter,

It’s Josh.

We’re just **HOURS** away from our deadline, so I’ll be quick.

**We are under attack.** This month, a conservative PAC dropped $4.6 million in NY-19 specifically to defeat us.

Why? Because they know I’m a check on the Trump administration and that I refuse to sell Upstate New York over to utility companies. The MAGA machine wants to replace me with a MAGA Republican who already has a record of scandals and profiting as families struggle.

This is the first deadline of the new quarter, and how we end the month will shape our momentum for the months ahead. We can’t afford to fall behind.

subject: Three things
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:

Hey friend — Three things.
1. I told you a few days ago that our campaign is having a really slow month of fundraising. We need people to step up and chip in if we are going to hit our goal before tonight’s midnight deadline.

2. These deadlines and goals aren’t arbitrary — our campaign has to budget for everything we do, and we set goals to make sure we can afford what we need to run a winning campaign operation.

3. Every dollar we raise goes back into our work to organize against ICE, hold the Trump administration accountable, and win over the votes we need to take the majority in Congress in this year’s midterms.

But here’s the problem: Despite all of these good reasons to chip in, our fundraising is still **way behind** where we need to be before midnight.
I’m starting to wonder: Is there anything I can say to convince you to help me out tonight? I need you.

name: Team Goldman
subject: The Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
---
We're disgusted, Peter. The Supreme Court’s conservative majority just issued a ruling out of Louisiana that is nothing short of a direct assault on our democracy. By requiring a racial gerrymandering claim to be both “intentional” and “not political,” they have effectively rendered Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act a "dead letter." [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519161/618030651/-1870630518?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjJjNGU1ZC1mNTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xGTa124fowVYCLzdxTlncL4bmEs-1b4MiJi8eJ72vzc=) Let’s be clear about what is happening: This radical, MAGA-aligned Court is providing a roadmap for Republican-led states to systematically redraw districts to exclude minorities from any representation of their communities. This decision erases decades of progress, allows GOP racial gerrymandering, and undermines the crucial role the Voting Rights Act has played in protecting Black and brown communities from voter suppression. **This is nothing less than a coordinated effort to ensure Republicans can maintain power by choosing their voters, rather than letting voters choose their representatives.** From hand-picked justices who misled the Senate under oath to this latest attack on the centerpiece of the Civil Rights Movement, the legitimacy of this Court is in tatters. They are no longer acting as an independent judiciary — they are acting as the specialized legal arm of the MAGA movement. Dan has spent his career holding these people accountable — and continues to fight back against powerful actors trying to bend the system to their will. **But as he stands up to their lies and abuses of power, he becomes a top target for their attacks. clean_body: | We're disgusted, Peter. The Supreme Court’s conservative majority just issued a ruling out of Louisiana that is nothing short of a direct assault on our democracy. By requiring a racial gerrymandering claim to be both “intentional” and “not political,” they have effectively rendered Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act a "dead letter." = Let’s be clear about what is happening: This radical, MAGA-aligned Court is providing a roadmap for Republican-led states to systematically redraw districts to exclude minorities from any representation of their communities. This decision erases decades of progress, allows GOP racial gerrymandering, and undermines the crucial role the Voting Rights Act has played in protecting Black and brown communities from voter suppression. This is nothing less than a coordinated effort to ensure Republicans can maintain power by choosing their voters, rather than letting voters choose their representatives. From hand-picked justices who misled the Senate under oath to this latest attack on the centerpiece of the Civil Rights Movement, the legitimacy of this Court is in tatters. They are no longer acting as an independent judiciary — they are acting as the specialized legal arm of the MAGA movement. Dan has spent his career holding these people accountable — and continues to fight back against powerful actors trying to bend the system to their will. But as he stands up to their lies and abuses of power, he becomes a top target for their attacks. This won’t stop us, but Dan needs you alongside him in this fight. = | = The 1965 Voting Rights Act was written in blood. It was designed to end the very discrimination the Supreme Court just invited back into our electoral process. We cannot let this stand. If we don’t hold MAGA Republicans accountable during the upcoming midterms, we risk losing the very foundation of our representative government. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with us. name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Before you log off
body:
I want to share something with you before you log off for the night
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Hi Peter, before you log off for the night, I want to share something with you.
But first: [**will you pitch in any amount to my campaign before our end-of-month fundraising deadline at midnight?**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1356?c0=em_ms_gh_20260430_3_final.CJXa7J&refcode=em20260430-1032&t=1&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)
I _never_ set out to run for office.
But in 2012, when my son’s neighborhood school was in danger of closing, I had to do something about it. I couldn’t just sit back and watch it happen. So I ran for the Austin school board to stop it.
That first race taught me something I’ve never forgotten. You can’t underestimate what ordinary people can do when they decide to fight for something that matters.
And that is the exact spirit I’m bringing into this campaign for Governor.
We have six months until Election Day. Six months to show up across Texas, listen in every corner of this state, and build the kind of campaign that earns trust and delivers real change. But that requires resources.
Tonight, we have an important monthly fundraising deadline.
We’re incredibly close to hitting our April goal. My team ran the numbers, and if you and just a few more supporters chip in before midnight, I know we can get there.
**So, if you can spare even a couple of dollars tonight, I’d be truly grateful:[secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_20260430_3_final](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1356?c0=em_ms_gh_20260430_3_final.CJXa7J&refcode=em20260430-1032&t=2&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)**
Thank you for being part of this campaign, Peter.
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260430-3&t=3&refcode2=1032_299639_mpHYFV&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260430-3&recurring=1&t=4&refcode2=1032_299639_mpHYFV&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=5&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=6&akid=1032%2E299639%2EmpHYFV)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: Throughout the history of our country, when Americans have stood up and fought for justice, they have prevailed.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CONGRESSIONAL PROGRESSIVE CAUCUS PAC, WEAREPROGRESSIVES
body:
|

Peter, it’s Bernie Sanders. Let me give you the good news and the bad news. **The bad news:** Donald Trump is rapidly moving this country into an oligarchic, authoritarian society and is continuing his attacks against the working class. **The good news:** The American people are catching on and fighting back. Not only are Trump’s approval ratings plummeting, but strong progressives are being elected all across the country. ** _But the work doesn’t stop there._ If you want to see a Congress with the courage to stand up to the insurance industry, the fossil fuel industry, big tech, and the oligarchs who control the political and economic life of our nation – we have to work together. [**_That’s why I am reaching out to you today. The Congressional Progressive Caucus PAC is dedicated to electing progressive leaders across the country and they need your support. Will you donate $27 (or anything you can afford) today? >>_**](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/86284?t=9&refcode=EM_ALL_CPC_FR_5_2026-04-30_BER_EOM_ES-47352_RS&amount=27&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) The political future of our country rests upon one very simple principle: **the need for working people to stand together, fight back against corporate greed and create an economy that works for all of us, and not just billionaires and large corporations.** We have to get involved in the political process — run for office, connect with our local, state and federal legislators, donate to candidates who will fight for the working class of this country. We have to create new channels for communication and information sharing. We have to volunteer not just politically, but to build community locally. We have to support progressive candidates running for office and push establishment Democrats to find the courage to take on the billionaire class of this country. And today, I am asking for your help to do that: [**_Please donate $27 or anything you can. Your donation will directly support the Progressive Caucus and progressives who need our help to win in the next election._**](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/86284?t=10&refcode=EM_ALL_CPC_FR_5_2026-04-30_BER_EOM_ES-47352_RS&amount=27&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[DONATE $27](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/86284?t=11&expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_CPC_FR_5_2026-04-30_BER_EOM_ES-47352_RS&amount=27&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq)**
---
| **[DONATE OTHER](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/86284?t=12&refcode=EM_ALL_CPC_FR_5_2026-04-30_BER_EOM_ES-47352_RS&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq)**
---
The struggle we’re in will not be easy, but keep the faith. We will win.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/86284?t=13&refcode=EM_ALL_CPC_FR_5_2026-04-30_BER_EOM_ES-47352_RS&amount=26&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq)
[ ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/47233?t=2&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) **Thousands of Progressives have signed up to receive our messages straight to their phone! This is the best and fastest way to support Progressives._Text 'CPC' to 20704 NOW to join!_** _Text "HELP" for help or "STOP" to end. Message and Data rates may apply._ Thank you for being a dedicated supporter of the Progressive Caucus! **We elect bold Progressives to Congress who will:** [ ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/47233?t=3&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) [ We're proud to be 100% grassroots funded, meaning we never accept SuperPAC contributions or Special Interest Money. If you want to chip in to be a part of our movement, **_click here._**](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/47281?t=4&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) [ Chip in now to elect Progressives → ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/88828?akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) [ Make a monthly contribution to elect Progressives → ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/88829?akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) We're emailing you today -- _because we need to elect a wave of Progressive leaders._ Without the help of our grassroots supporters, we'd have nothing. And if we can't fundraise, **Progressives will lose and Republicans will win.** While Republicans rely on corporate SuperPACs, we count on grassroots donors like you to do our work. Every penny goes towards electing bold Progressives across the country. [ Chip in now to elect Progressives → ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/88828?akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) [ Make a monthly contribution to elect Progressives → ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/88829?akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) If you'd like to connect with us on Facebook, [**_click here._** If you'd like to follow us on X, ](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/47235?t=5&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq)[**_click here._**](https://act.weareprogressives.org/go/47236?t=6&akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq) If you really want to go, [click here to unsubscribe from our activist list](https://act.weareprogressives.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=27443%2E3658908%2EneMHoq). name: David Hogg
subject: Asking one more time before midnight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Hey Peter,

I wanted to reach out one last time before our deadline hits tonight at
midnight.

This is the biggest year for Leaders We Deserve yet. Our candidates have
been taking on the corporate machine, standing up for their communities,
and flipping districts they said we couldn’t.

The House majority is within reach. We’re taking back state legislatures.
And we’re changing the face of power in the Democratic Party.

And with even more endorsements on the way, we need the resources to
continue backing bold progressives and show that we have what it takes to
win.

We don’t take a dime from corporate PACs or special interests, and we
never will. So when I say your support is critical, I mean it. There are
no billionaires or corporate checks waiting in the wings. It all comes
down to this movement, and the people who believe in it.

That’s why I’m asking you one more time: [ https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260430_3_eom.3Fpe-m&refcode=em20260430-3426&amount=3&t=1001&akid=3426%2E587540%2EYQu3qa ]Can you pitch in
$3, or whatever is comfortable for you, to help us reach our
goal before midnight tonight?

— David

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=3426%2E587540%2EYQu3qa
Update Your Information: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/
Unsubscribe: https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=3426%2E587540%2EYQu3qa

Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE #192
Washington, DC 20003
info@leaderswedeserve.com

subject: I hope you don’t mind me reaching out so personally, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
I’ve taken a leap of faith and poured my heart into a private note.

| | | [](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e5b5c9c6e69e4ea38bb2615ce99a1a03&_e=1byAmFJAlx7P4xRoiJ2ZGIC97NGknaNciuXvrLxoRQfkfmfgSAUq1ghdBNg_vNYLpiUu06CAS1sAx6KZAzLtV6jdCrXhFfqHYO3FLkFwHH_IwRUAt9zl1D_22Dpy3kz01UCDvgjB6zovY0OsxG2r5B-ez-JD6_cs5bzZsgpQRK1qy-4g2hpScj6jLkOSvdmUG7ikE_xgXOD3EP28xTe_YlYSMo4g95hHVzGRRZu5F2rpQ3tvVYASsDdtsKp-g6qlPB0XSKRYOzRnduZxfo_8oMkQ0Z9ub5OZ3tXG7hnsYs2VtnOCyQey98HURO99GA25hC-cwcGuElOfXLlzioKKI7hqtLRMPrh06fX_nyfXJhd-bM5WlltPLBurNpAJHaiRrLLq6OhOBeKoljrT_DnLtHycJSi7v0AuxLVsGoR8QkKKzox2nUUyc9Zm-UmvF99mmqdK-N4G35XODbacIZ-wp1mDAMZ0kDf4AayWhkPcdCFBlFGoCkrPNAyi-x42WYokCqWZs-Gna4qE-a6sTrkFrk69MOMhcjoYkxb89n3TU5m1S-BC1K5qCRXQQ_E0Nj09iHxXqmKT7MOygtnsX-bcgPLbu4HAX5Auv51TphnpocROPfx9k8U6Wi12lx5PvMjdjsnniGDREB0HjNMVH9OPV-2gIr6UslmbpyhoiwSYVjAeP0iQuTEc-qjhZTcLoAH4HDjgD1RZtuRoxtysEw9xb2utqXhTf0c4U2C9WsiIIu6gmQ1h3pPjB1G22ALWSQKs57BWMJEd0AScsS0wJ9dWWqecVDzuX72iEfBoMa84Taf-hznBnO1Lc8UGD5MhMyMnI2HXrYgKAexuhCx6cU_ICA%3D%3D)
---
Hi, I hope you don’t mind me reaching out so personally, Peter. I’m sitting here alone tonight, staring at our latest reports, and I’m struggling to find the words. I usually try so hard to stay strong and keep a brave face for the rest of the team, but looking at these numbers... **_I’m_** _**_distraught_**_** _._** The truth is, we are much further behind than I ever imagined we’d be at this point. _**_It’s a weight_**_ I honestly can’t carry by myself anymore, and I fear what’s going to happen next. I feel like we’re letting you down and failing the mission we started together. I’ve spent all night trying to figure this out, and I’ve reached the point where I have to swallow my pride and humble myself before you. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t urgent, but I don’t know where else to turn. You’re truly the _**_only person_ **_I feel I can trust with the full truth right now.
---
[**I’ve taken a leap of faith and poured my heart into a private note for you that explains exactly what’s happening and why I’m so worried.****Please, take a moment to read it:**](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e5b5c9c6e69e4ea38bb2615ce99a1a03&_e=1byAmFJAlx7P4xRoiJ2ZGIC97NGknaNciuXvrLxoRQfkfmfgSAUq1ghdBNg_vNYLpiUu06CAS1sAx6KZAzLtV6jdCrXhFfqHYO3FLkFwHH_IwRUAt9zl1D_22Dpy3kz01UCDvgjB6zovY0OsxG2r5B-ez-JD6_cs5bzZsgpQRK1qy-4g2hpScj6jLkOSvdmUG7ikE_xgXOD3EP28xTe_YlYSMo4g95hHVzGRRZu5F2rpQ3tvVYASsDdtsKp-g6qlPB0XSKRYOzRnduZxfo_8oMkQ0Z9ub5OZ3tXG7hnsYs3GkBgOjNd8WVufRxxOv91hTtNkED1gllD_IUyhDtcuCs_ZVG_x2XpTKWUw99pVLBaRDzFX7m7H39C_wNGqOA_J1H0FBayILjzTgAoo31MJvtia7TX3-4n7JyL6f3aNoKipVro2jeuESXWAwiGH66xVaPlq9KF9V_B-kBwcCiXwOWpzgwjeRSRDzaMxRbQUV5F5W7SQVgKUMjPuBdP7BBhpm0KybuNsHE2ot1vKxDGg0VVKU3OD0jwhCq_TjNAXnxHl8I-4Fox98uPHSpM3AWGc6y6v6lLJ77oKhvS9vFTtFAHgg7AyXNyv-i86_oIiYtiRskpwCqvEolB4Q2lkGaTvbyGFG8TgLVBNrvcOew2JMi0fNizXFkAkDoswwM3E6RzDY2ogfAJwGEvCF_64yflV6vJstc-utp1vvEh6YMEzaRfv7moIDo-MhFxKPnIKu4dv5RKWzlQmmIhh6mXhLMZPrF05Rvq4STnFlYlgVv8ewUTCb4yZQZW6ZqKHVE6LUEnu-rBa0H2BWP5QmZ8JB3x311VN8EKwpZg0dMX9GnlWlw%3D%3D)

---
| | [](https://links.katiebrittforsenate.com/u/click?_t=64058844820c43dab0e6ed55204bc487&_m=e5b5c9c6e69e4ea38bb2615ce99a1a03&_e=1byAmFJAlx7P4xRoiJ2ZGIC97NGknaNciuXvrLxoRQfkfmfgSAUq1ghdBNg_vNYLnJhmIWO38TZUuRYnHwqLmY5UKDFObTCxw23PVzADMleFUz_Qvxwt8sK9WkZJK8Mhf7mGNqwoRseYsElb1w9kcoSoUQn9TsmdaqtmDqoQVE1ABbmnUIiqyH4_S5uWFeSY7aD_BbY4jmdKjGTSKZmD628PCGqgZ_2r31hwVXT8Ayqb2ZH5dPaAbOWSrlQUdCWr5uDzW-0E2-vUzzyAXidZsmkHNwEe9eBshtXNH4XzKRVn_IUWnEap0D7R09dXLNLw39_KGHFiAEGGYe56a4JlXK5sIFk9lb_6VEbfDOj8gQes61HeU-X2pl-3izERN_WpHHxJ5ve0DwRhBsNb0kDMkxrNr6HI_vnjoQwfOHKi0kRaZ2kkKHd1MLLCWNfmC1ye4r_ruWeesslLNAXA8LPOC6KMY1y8sj7sifNTZANiAwo%3D)
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing _everything_ they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?

clean_body: I’ve taken a leap of faith and poured my heart into a private note. | | | Hi, I hope you don’t mind me reaching out so personally, Peter. I’m sitting here alone tonight, staring at our latest reports, and I’m struggling to find the words. I usually try so hard to stay strong and keep a brave face for the rest of the team, but looking at these numbers... I’m distraught . The truth is, we are much further behind than I ever imagined we’d be at this point. It’s a weight I honestly can’t carry by myself anymore, and I fear what’s going to happen next. I feel like we’re letting you down and failing the mission we started together. I’ve spent all night trying to figure this out, and I’ve reached the point where I have to swallow my pride and humble myself before you. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t urgent, but I don’t know where else to turn. You’re truly the only person I feel I can trust with the full truth right now. I hope you’ll understand why I’m reaching out like this. Time is ticking, and I really need your help on this one. Best, KB | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong. Faith. Family. Freedom. The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored. From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul. This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. Will you stand with me? Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.

from Pennsylvania in 2026. Needless to say... this is pretty important.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I’ve never written you a letter like this
body:
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
\- - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - - -
| Patriot,
---
I'm not writing you this letter from _Congressman_ Jim Jordan.
---
Instead, I'm writing to you just as _Jim_ - husband, father of 4, and sports fan.
---
So, as a fellow patriot like you who loves our country, I say this with a heavy heart...
---
... _A far-Left Democrat Governor just RIGGED the congressional map in Virginia, likely costing Republicans 4 SEATS in the House_.
---
In response, some have turned to despair: _" It's all over." "We're doomed." "We're powerless."_
---
Some have even blamed top activists like you for the loss for not giving an extra donation on a random Tuesday. _They are just shameful for saying that ... _
---
Let's be honest. That's _not_ the American spirit.
---
**Does that doom and gloom sound like President Trump when he was targeted ...wrongfully ARRESTED FOUR TIMES...and still kept fighting?**
---
Here's the truth: _I don 't care if the polling says we're down 99 points and a storm is brewing, you will _NEVER_ hear the word "SURRENDER" come out of my mouth._
---
That's a promise.
---
And I've put skin in the game to prove it... I've been _SUED_ _and_ _SPIED_ on by the Deep State - and all because they know I fight for YOU.
---
**Now comes our most important fight. We can 't let the Democrats get away with rigging the congressional map.**
---
Emergency mid-decade redistricting battles are now taking place all across America - and with ZERO margin for error, we need to know exactly who will show up to vote.
---
That means our Trump Voter Census has to be 100% complete and 100% accurate - and I know with absolute confidence that the President and I can count on you. _Now let 's make it official._
---
[**So please, complete the brief questionnaire to verify YOUR profile in our Census now that a nationwide redistricting battle is looming.**](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=cf0d5d2aae744c71b98bcb1de44b2ce5&_e=PZm1SfAk7Tsx7-7U8Ly3FGw58rpo5Oa5EJlI4apa1goqD7Zz0AQfCLp0ly_60BnhUCpzXXn3bOwNlr49a4FXwwLcrz2yHqtCdvp6oqEKBqMimT2RbN--zsUb5XatV70VZ8mdguecs7oC0-m3zWoSIqyOHt2yGUfXlL0p5QKe1KwNe6LDnI4ndr_ndkBwIVOQAWD1HSh_nn88_96d5wjXNOMXblQUWLUm4btRVQQIcW-doPgPlqn74LeeOlJ_JqWxDe-ostXUBfjjEgcliMG2SibINOJsV_vGdPnp-FdDVGryh6-GTHbb-re7xPhPkTR5jWyQ32rXi6zCd14yPzEp98wweCmrcARp35cw7b13uvl4muSHWxf9rMSPZ0NJjijvqq2aTNYMqVSAMqGue41j8Ob29ePRquRdw7clDo0A5H-DuDhltuAWJw0o_P4ZoZxeZi2nzbhbEhMtaWZTmncvgRd9vyn7WpjQFEfhYnegZhdkbf6j2JF7NEWbAXi2m7Epct6V3Rh-kJZk5-mt6P8PtsJTI83rvD5TB8OnaZ7twl2gTMUgk1ztmWaPNyvouB7N-X3N1wbczm0KCulWibKJbg%3D%3D)

---

[COMPLETE THE QUESTIONNAIRE](https://links.stayinformednow.net/u/click?_t=c02d37b0057e4505a2324dee8ee3dc76&_m=cf0d5d2aae744c71b98bcb1de44b2ce5&_e=PZm1SfAk7Tsx7-7U8Ly3FGw58rpo5Oa5EJlI4apa1goqD7Zz0AQfCLp0ly_60BnhUCpzXXn3bOwNlr49a4FXwwLcrz2yHqtCdvp6oqEKBqMimT2RbN--zsUb5XatV70VZ8mdguecs7oC0-m3zWoSIqyOHt2yGUfXlL0p5QKe1KwNe6LDnI4ndr_ndkBwIVOQhYgT6E3A025B5nySDjHveewyIRNG5tK-Tkkz_1mQ28BheW12VFOLmkfm21u3Le4Cw5CLEdwXzNDFFLOnxYRgC24XvF1oI93YGvs6lL1w-z2ZZBQelEKWG5t2HxSvkjlPMjLoOWps-DPY8Dtvzx1-Pjr7czNCE1bAKLMlOG9VvuMZoN5iVqtipKrepnLjgAj65-CfSoqhjVmimUVctLteehqI50gJoGzMypNPI8J-_1SDSIzRx_i8GvCZZFdHw8gx2GVbCi2o--S6HVrZiXwDguAJCNOLZVAbD4pmE9cBgzxVYVbiMXta9xj4CLOpZ_v3sa32_2HVx7zsOtTQcvFRl3Z8xCT8Hr62R7Dg2qBKjYCzlbsdtVC8H1fVhEmBAvN0vrdP9xlPfx7x9RCc8XDmIA%3D%3D)

Thank you, God bless you, and NEVER, EVER GIVE UP!
---

body:
My team tells me we’re only a couple thousand dollars short.
#
Hi Peter — it's Tim. Reaching out one last time ahead of Small Town PAC’s first fundraising deadline just a few hours away.
**My team tells me we’re only a couple thousand dollars short of reaching our $100,000 goal.** I know we can close that gap if everyone reading this gives $5, $10, or whatever you can spare.
[**Let’s start Small Town PAC off with a bang: chip in any amount before midnight!**](https://act.timwalz.com/go/73?c0=stp-ms-em-20260430-2.Oq4Pro&amount=5&refcode=em20260430-568&t=1&akid=568%2E34582%2EkFXjUb)

Tim Walz started Small Town PAC to build a Democratic Party that invests in small towns and delivers a message that resonates with rural America.
Together, we're finding and recruiting thoughtful, hardworking people to run for office, and supporting a new generation of leaders who truly reflect and understand their communities.
**[It’s time for Democrats to expand the map and put small towns back at the forefront: pitch in now to help build our movement from the ground up.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stp-ms-em-footer?refcode=em20260430-568&t=21&refcode2=568_34582_kFXjUb&akid=568%2E34582%2EkFXjUb)**

clean_body: My team tells me we’re only a couple thousand dollars short. Hi Peter — it's Tim. Reaching out one last time ahead of Small Town PAC’s first fundraising deadline just a few hours away. My team tells me we’re only a couple thousand dollars short of reaching our $100,000 goal. I know we can close that gap if everyone reading this gives $5, $10, or whatever you can spare. Tim Walz started Small Town PAC to build a Democratic Party that invests in small towns and delivers a message that resonates with rural America. Together, we're finding and recruiting thoughtful, hardworking people to run for office, and supporting a new generation of leaders who truly reflect and understand their communities.

name: CA Democratic Party
subject: Celebrating Arab American Heritage Month
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
| | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519860/618047304/-1801952908?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478)
---
| | | **This[Arab American Heritage Month](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519861/618047305/-844499796?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478), we honor the rich culture and history of Arab Americans who have helped move our Party, state and nation forward.**

California is home to the largest and most diverse population of Arab Americans in the nation, and our state’s history has long been shaped by this community–from elected leaders and labor rights leaders to entrepreneurs, artists and scientists. In 2022, [Little Arabia](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519866/618047307/-146430845?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478) in Anaheim, California was designated the [first Arab-American cultural district in the nation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519872/618047313/2095804567?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478)–only made possible by decades of organizing by hundreds of activists, business owners and residents who fought to be seen and represented.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519875/618047319/2095804567?utm_source=ig_web_copy_link&igsh=MzRlODBiNWFlZA%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478)
---
California also passed the [MENA Inclusion Act](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130519878/618047322/-1324542103?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODA1YzcxMy1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=g7Wto3n-29DQEg7F2k1HHNarwdyMXsCsx8PEc3ukQbk=&emci=90d31f02-1744-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=9805c713-f944-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=560478), ensuring that Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) communities are counted and represented in data collection that informs policy decisions on health care, education, civil rights and access to essential public services. That effort was led by a statewide coalition of more than a dozen grassroots, MENA-led, MENA-serving and MENA-founded organizations fighting to advance the rights and visibility of MENA Californians. Made up of over 20 nationalities and numerous religious groups, the Arab American community is rich in history and diverse in culture, and reaffirms what we know to be true here in California: Our diversity is what makes us great. Arab Americans have enriched communities across California and the country, and we are proud to celebrate their invaluable contributions to our shared history this month and always.
---
| | |

clean_body: | | | | | | | This, we honor the rich culture and history of Arab Americans who have helped move our Party, state and nation forward. California is home to the largest and most diverse population of Arab Americans in the nation, and our state’s history has long been shaped by this community–from elected leaders and labor rights leaders to entrepreneurs, artists and scientists. In 2022, in Anaheim, California was designated the –only made possible by decades of organizing by hundreds of activists, business owners and residents who fought to be seen and represented. California also passed the , ensuring that Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) communities are counted and represented in data collection that informs policy decisions on health care, education, civil rights and access to essential public services. That effort was led by a statewide coalition of more than a dozen grassroots, MENA-led, MENA-serving and MENA-founded organizations fighting to advance the rights and visibility of MENA Californians. Made up of over 20 nationalities and numerous religious groups, the Arab American community is rich in history and diverse in culture, and reaffirms what we know to be true here in California: Our diversity is what makes us great. Arab Americans have enriched communities across California and the country, and we are proud to celebrate their invaluable contributions to our shared history this month and always. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. This is about your MAGA Membership. Dear Peter, This letter outlines the dangers that will come if we do not step up and stand together in the upcoming midterm elections. I am personally asking you to read before it's too late. \- DJT | | | | | | | | | | Contributions to Trump National Committee JFC Inc. are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Peter, I promise to make this quick. We're down to the last few hours of April, and we could really use your help. The momentum in Texas - and TX-03 - is real. Earlier today, I mentioned recent polling here in our state. **With James Talarico at the top of the ticket, the energy is real. We can feel it on the ground at every gathering we attend. ** **But we 're still a bit short of our April goal, and we need to start May strong as we head into the Summer campaign season.** [**What we raise tonight is what powers the organizing needed to actually flip TX-03.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqs6gc2C5hUDUAX_oNaSPVDobFeqfVfzIW2x4J26hzyt8wdtQQ8Z2Vp7P2trscW_inkFd0oIk-6tYelJf1mmRb5ewjMWaov85I1mezhaiMEyxhfZS0GG1cgj3KLv22eIcCu5nwPERJ_2wB6zfcMuoCiRZjFW9fnCli2UUJeqkkWb2AKk52LChPgNXhY1cnhLT6fwEvbI-AI9zXvD4psOSAEoTeStFOU_JbhzrBff9vOf_Hytc7tqN_ruPO3rVJJPgnDtOLTuD6pz4XTI3juzzxWo/4q9/qABp6cbdQsK-m1NBanr4uw/h1/h001.I_NtG20m84J55l3MMN0f-uPYS6n7OMSWHkRcRb4S_Y8) If you've chipped in already, thank you! name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Less than half
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We’ll be brutally honest, Peter:

Our grassroots fundraising has significantly slowed. Just take a look for
yourself:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260430-2.9ODRYI&refcode=em20260430-37731&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37731%2E1203867%2ErNb3uO ]Bar chart showing values going down from January through April 2026.

April is coming to a close in just a few hours, and unfortunately, we’ve
only raised less than half as much as we did in March from one-time
donations.

That’s not good, especially as we head into the next four months of
Democratic primary elections, starting with Chris Rabb’s race in
Pennsylvania on May 19.

We came out swinging in the 2026 election cycle, endorsing 15 progressive
candidates running in open House seats or challenging out-of-touch
Democratic incumbents. So far, we’ve lost three of these races and won
one.

There are eleven more primaries to go, giving us the opportunity to send a
dozen Justice Democrats to join our Squad in Congress and fight for the
working-class.

But since we don’t take any corporate contributions, we depend directly on
grassroots contributions from folks like you to fuel our candidates and
fight back against AIPAC, billionaires, and corporate super PACs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260430-2.9ODRYI&refcode=em20260430-37731&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37731%2E1203867%2ErNb3uO ]If we don’t pick things up FAST, we won’t be able to invest as much as
we planned into these critical primary races. So
Peter, can we count on you to pitch in
$5 before our end-of-month deadline at midnight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260430-2.9ODRYI&refcode=em20260430-37731&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37731%2E1203867%2ErNb3uO ]Contribute $5

This year’s midterms are a major opportunity for our people-powered
movement to not only take seats back from Republicans, but to elect better
Democrats who will actually fight for the progressive policies we deserve
and demand.

Thank you for anything you can chip in to fuel our work and transform the
Party.

— Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260430-37731-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37731_1203867_rNb3uO&akid=37731%2E1203867%2ErNb3uO

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37731%2E1203867%2ErNb3uO

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Please, just hear me out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
| | |
---
Hi there, friend. Michael here with an urgent question:
**_[Is there _ANYTHING_ I can say to convince you to donate any amount to my campaign for governor before 11:59 p.m. MT today – my biggest end-of-month fundraising deadline yet in the Colorado governor's race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130520200/618049467/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1251-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDJlN2RjYi1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgQqXBfRVTQ-CMgsOSB_o2U-G4kUyMLqm53TGsND8T4=)_**

_What if_ I told you that Democratic governors are now a critical firewall at times when the federal government abuses its power and undermines civil liberties?
_What if_ I told you that I'm the only candidate in this race with a plan to shield Coloradans from Donald Trump's retaliation _and_ tackle the affordability crisis squeezing folks across our state – from increasing the supply of _real_ starter homes, to lowering health care costs by launching a public option, to expanding affordable child care options and _ so much more?_
_What if_ I told you my top GOP opponent is promising to free Trump's convicted Big Lie ally, Tina Peters, on Day One as governor – and that he's already raised more than **$2 MILLION** since the start of this year?
_What if_ I told you that national Republicans are already watching to see if we have the grassroots support to withstand their dark money-funded attack ads?
**_And_ _what if_ I told you that right now, we're still falling about 3% short of my $110,000 end-of-month goal, so if we don't close the gap in time, we _will not_ have the resources to fight back?**
These aren't just hypothetical questions, friend. Building the resources we need to win comes down to whether committed grassroots supporters like **you** help me reach every single goal from here on out, this one included.
So with time running out, I have to ask:** _[Will you please step up with a donation of $5, $25 or anything at all – _right now_ – to help me reach my $110,000 end-of-month goal, win in Colorado and keep our state blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130520203/618049470/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1251-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDJlN2RjYi1mOTQ0LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wgQqXBfRVTQ-CMgsOSB_o2U-G4kUyMLqm53TGsND8T4=)_**

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Catching up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I’m fighting for Wisconsin, and for our country.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**make a donation toward my April fundraising goal**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/5473?t=4&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT). But before I do, I want to give you a recap of what I’ve been working on this month. It’s been a busy month of defending Wisconsin’s best interests in the Senate. Trump’s reckless war in Iran — and the pain it’s causing here at home — took center stage. This illegal war is costing over a billion dollars a _day_ by most estimates, and Donald Trump has no plan for ending it. I led a war powers resolution that came to the Senate floor last week. It failed, but I will keep working to get Republican senators to stand up and use their authority. Meanwhile, I’m continuing to hold the USPS accountable to millions of Wisconsinites who rely on its services, pressing Postmaster General David Steiner for answers as to why it is taking weeks for mail to be delivered to some Wisconsin communities. Millions of Wisconsinites rely on the Postal Service to stay in touch with loved ones, pay bills, receive much-needed medications, and cast their votes. We have a duty to find solutions to these difficulties for the people we serve. Likewise, we have a duty to those who have served this nation. The administration announced its plans to overhaul the VA, and I’ve demanded that Veteran Affairs Secretary Doug Collins provide details about these plans and their impact on veterans’ services. Local communities need to know that access to care will not be compromised through the pursuit of administrative efficiency. Finally, I’m working to make sure all Packers fans can tune in to the game. I’ve introduced a bill to make it cheaper for people to watch their favorite teams by prohibiting league-owned streaming services, such as MLB.TV or NBA League Pass, from blacking out games and by requiring the leagues to provide a way for local fans to watch their home-state teams. **I’m fighting to deliver for working families in Wisconsin and to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Wisconsin.** [**So if you can, please consider pitching in a grassroots donation to fuel my work before our monthly deadline tonight. Every dollar brings us closer to more wins, more progress, and a brighter future for Wisconsin and our country.**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/5473?t=5&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $5](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-apr26.0nKLzm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-apr26.g4RcXd&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-apr26.jZ9M4W&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-apr26.xE0bws&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-apr26.0dFPa0&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-apr26.56i60J&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20260430_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)
---
Thanks,
Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=5397%2E35263%2EQTQ6OT)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Reaching out personally
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I’m so grateful that I don’t need to have billionaires on speed dial to keep this campaign running.
Hi there, it's Sarah!
I’m reaching out personally because we’re just a few hours away from our end-of-month fundraising deadline, and we’re still about $3,200 away from our goal.
With the midterms just months away and Delaware Republicans gearing up to try and flip this seat red, it’s important that we don’t fall short. Can you pitch in at the link below to help us meet this goal?
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20260430-2**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260430-2.ab8Y1N&refcode=em20260430-3197&t=1&akid=3197%2E21716%2EHebnvJ)
I’m so grateful that I don’t need to have billionaires on speed dial to keep this campaign running. Month after month, grassroots supporters like you pitch in an average donation of just $38 at a time to keep me in Congress fighting for our neighbors.
So thank you, friend, for your support. I couldn’t do it without you!
— Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20260430-2&t=2&refcode2=3197_21716_HebnvJ&akid=3197%2E21716%2EHebnvJ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
