name: Sherrod Brown
subject: A surge in Republican spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| Experts all agree: This race is anyone's game.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1) I have important news, Peter: **_Inside Elections_ just shifted our race in our direction – a few days after experts at _The Cook Political Report_ moved our race to “Toss Up.”** [**The momentum behind our campaign is surging, and I need folks like you to chip in $10, split between my campaign and Blue Amp Action, to keep it going. Will you rush a donation so we can win in Ohio and flip the Senate?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1) | | [DONATE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
---
**I am National Republicans' top target to beat and this new expert rating is going to pull even more attention toward our race.** They've already launched false attack ads against me – and now, they’re dumping $80 MILLION into Ohio to flood the airwaves with even more lies. It’s their biggest investment in the entire country.
This new rating proves we’re running a winning campaign. **But it also paints a bigger target on our backs.** Especially with more polls showing me caught in a dead heat against my opponent.
Take it from me – these race ratings always lead to a surge in Republican spending. When they see campaigns like ours gaining traction, they get scared. And with Senate control on the line, they’ll pour an ocean of money into Ohio to win.
We don’t know what’s coming next, but we need today to be a record-breaking fundraising day. **That’s why my team and I set a rapid-response goal to raise $300,000 before midnight – and I’m counting on your support to show the GOP what we’re made of.**
Polls don’t win elections. Votes do. And the only thing that matters on Election Day is if we’re able to reach enough voters directly and share our message in time.
[**So if you’ve been waiting for the perfect time to make a donation to help us win in Ohio and flip the Senate, today is the day. Please, Peter, will you chip in to my campaign and Blue Amp Action right now?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=7&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_
| [DONATE $10 →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11561?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=8&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
---
| [DONATE $25 →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11562?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=9&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
---
| [DONATE MORE →](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11563?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.30_Brown-Inside-Elections_B5_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=10&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
---
Thanks for being part of this movement.
Sherrod
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=11&refcode2=2166_259176_qHpDF1&akid=2166%2E259176%2EqHpDF1)
---

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately: | | | Thanks for being part of this movement. Sherrod | We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world. Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country. If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | |

subject: Before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund and authorized by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
| | | | |
---
Hi, Peter. I’m reaching out one more time before midnight to ask for your support in reaching our crucial $500,000 end-of-month goal. If that’s all you need to hear, please add your donation at the link below:
**[https:/secure.actblue.com/donate](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10248?t=2&akid=1243%2E124072%2EFtT5At)**
Senate control is at stake here in North Carolina, and our race has been ranked by experts at Inside Elections as the only Toss-Up Senate seat currently held by a Republican. That’s why the GOP is planning to pour at least $71 million into this race to defeat me – and it’s why Trump is personally attacking me. I can’t fight back without people like you chipping in at important moments like this.
**Please, this is the last call:** Will you donate now (before the midnight deadline) to help us reach our goal, flip NC blue and take back the Senate? **[https:/secure.actblue.com/donate](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10248?t=3&akid=1243%2E124072%2EFtT5At)**
The amount doesn’t matter nearly as much as the contribution itself. Thank you.
Roy Cooper

body:

---
| | | Dear Friend, The May 1st deadline is critical to ensuring we have the resources to communicate our message and reach voters before the election. If you’re able, please consider making a contribution today: [DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/dkQjCGZlth1?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02) As a proud fourth-generation San Mateo County resident with over 20 years of public service, I’m running for Assessor-County Clerk-Recorder and Chief Elections Officer to modernize this office and restore confidence in how it serves our community. A prior review made it clear that stronger leadership, greater transparency, and improved trust are needed, and I’m ready to deliver. As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand that accountability, sound management, and collaboration are essential to delivering reliable public services. As your Chief Elections Officer, I will ensure elections are secure, efficient, and accessible to all eligible voters, while strengthening transparency and public trust. This is an important moment for our county. With your help, we can build the momentum needed to win. We’re up against an important May 1st deadline, every contribution today helps us reach more voters before Election Day.: [DONATE NOW](https://us.list-manage.com/1766BsSRhB8?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

Thank you for your support,
[
David Canepa
San Mateo County Supervisor](https://us.list-manage.com/EFoXcFyvGx6?e=c0babbc643&c2id=bfcaacdd1ef4033edfed3d4b1d472a02)

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mandela for Wisconsin
body:
Making hard choices
| I didn’t make this decision lightly. When I announced my campaign for governor of Wisconsin, I did it because I saw how much our working families were struggling – and what would be at stake if a Republican was elected to lead this state. _Healthcare costs are skyrocketing because Tom Tiffany voted against extending subsidies._ _Our family farms and small businesses are feeling the squeeze due to the Trump-Tiffany economic plan._ _And when Republicans care more about lining the pockets of their billionaire backers, working families lose out on affordable housing and groceries._ **I’m in this race for the same reason I first began public service — because Wisconsinites deserve a state where they can thrive, not just scrape by paycheck to paycheck.[In a few hours, we’re closing the books on our April fundraising. If you agree with me, you can use this link to make a contribution of any amount to power our campaign.](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-apr26.K8_u48&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_043026_B3_EOM&t=2&akid=6113%2E196590%2E3kzkj5)** **Tiffany will bring the rampant dysfunction and far-right extremism of Washington here to Wisconsin.** Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we’ve built a movement that is ready to do things the Wisconsin Way, not the Washington Way. That means finally expanding healthcare, delivering relief for our farmers and small businesses, lowering the cost of housing, and raising wages. This is the kind of bold vision we deserve — and it will take all of us coming together to achieve it. [ I hope you’ll pitch in any amount that is meaningful to you before midnight so we can keep growing this grassroots movement → ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-apr26.K8_u48&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_043026_B3_EOM&t=3&akid=6113%2E196590%2E3kzkj5)** _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=mb-em-fr-apr26.MCM433&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_043026_B3_EOM&t=4&akid=6113%2E196590%2E3kzkj5)

Friend, I have good and bad news.

**The good news: **Earlier this month, we launched our very first digital ad, putting our campaign in front of thousands of voters who will decide this race!

**The bad news:** I just chatted with our finance team, and we’re $796 from reaching our April fundraising goal.

If we fall short, we may have to make painful cuts, including pulling our ad off the air right as voters are starting to pay attention. [With mere weeks until the primary, we can’t risk losing any ground or missing a single opportunity to connect with voters. So I’m personally asking, will you chip in right now to help us close our critical April fundraising gap and keep our ad on the air? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130520552/618055243/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260430_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMwODVmOWMtZmI0NC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7vkCVCGlZnhT6uB4IlckMqJ5eGZE8f9zUeuO9H3Dg8=) | [RUSH A DONATION RIGHT NOW >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130520553/618055244/-1252702269?amount=10&refcode=JBFC_20260430_EMDF_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTkxMTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjMwODVmOWMtZmI0NC1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=r7vkCVCGlZnhT6uB4IlckMqJ5eGZE8f9zUeuO9H3Dg8=)

Dr. Jasmeet Bains

Friend,

clean_body: We can’t risk missing an opportunity to connect with voters! | = Friend, I have good and bad news. The good news: Earlier this month, we launched our very first digital ad, putting our campaign in front of thousands of voters who will decide this race! The bad news: I just chatted with our finance team, and we’re $796 from reaching our April fundraising goal. If we fall short, we may have to make painful cuts, including pulling our ad off the air right as voters are starting to pay attention. = | = Your support means everything. Dr. Jasmeet Bains \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Bains Subject: A key race update! To: Democratic Voter Friend, Our team is working to hit our April fundraising goal, but first, let us give you a key race update: 1. Polling shows that Dr. Jasmeet Bains is TIED with Republican Congressman Valadao. That means CA-22 is one of the best pickup opportunities for Democrats! 2. Republicans are pouring money into this race because they know this district— and their House majority — are more fragile than ever. They’re pulling out all the stops to protect their razor-thin majority. 3. In a battleground district, it’s absolutely critical that we reach as many voters as we can with Dr. Bains’ campaign message. That’s why we just launched a new digital ad, and we need the funds to keep it on the air. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thank you, Team Bains | | Paid for by Dr. Jasmeet Bains for Congress (www.drjasmeetbains.com) 8200 Stockdale HWY STE M-10 #252 Bakersfield, CA 93311 Please, consider making a =. name: Chip Roy
subject: Midnight tonight
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY
body:
Our critical April deadline is tonight at midnight, and California billionaires are coming after Texas. |
We’re less than a month away from our May 26th runoff, Peter.

_I have good and bad news._

First, the bad news ... California billionaires are trying to buy this seat. They think that they can buy Texas by flooding our state with millions of liberal dollars.

They know I am the only conservative in the runoff who will be a disruptive force against the Green New Scam. I am the only person in this race with a proven constitutional conservative record who will take on the establishment.

It’s all coming at one of the most important times of this runoff - the final days of this race.

**We cannot afford to put up anything but strong April fundraising numbers.** The Swamp is desperate to see me fall short.

_But here’s the good news. I have your support, Peter._

**The radical Left might have its California billionaires, and my opponent has his trust fund. But I have you.**

Will you help us send a message to the media and my self-funding opponent that our grassroots momentum is still strong?

**[I know we will with you and conservatives like you, by my side.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=75ebf481b81443258063179ce06a22a3&_e=FJmQP3osNm1fqmPVodIzY-6NW-Ui7clAehurGiT8PaDzYtfuFNmj6uD6oZvnv8tnjyfLtS6kKockTZpj97O4CKq8lvw34k-cRpTyKi-GxazacRQf2_QLWKspYN2bImos6OZKM4e1s-Ygmg3HMHYmLBaz1M7eDhZ5cuiP3XmRnliJEor-b4--0SmuJyRRFMK_19HF6ptJS6ZSFI4TmDXNe8KXEKI_pwmLm_JIc0x_5EePKxD15Kl1EtMOC0IOXZYr85qMt7NntxnM1lQlnbx_szavj9neUiJxVcpMPdh-CTXDoBjfCuqJAXWD18cX-r1ZV8HNpRZiosUcbGsq07T1UrDPwzAmvQXFKbV8uaqN6-hCz38PYKqg7yYrcf444eG2lAV9X0mQY9953QEtdfSU_kPx4F1YD3bqYs8Z0wQyI92zWbfHIk7HTfIIgOhUrNXEMvPK1sO2XHtClOz3p3IxnROQ1jQEIeVi7jTYzKSJ3Tr1vmYoC8AJQDTBoQMdpRRVt30_JBV_6KcrmIahfq3M_6isMkuWHRen9FAfa3rYF5lEwSYMtoqg4e60wN4JEkUpTinOf5hqilUedZGEngQITRGdXpfS9SMauD3MqG5e-p7YQWkFOiUn-jT99HRs-Uef7rpzcjA0QgCAZK_oXia4R-w3p2P89VTm8bUcScrCvbEyCa3s4nOp6gT5TabPd1ha)**

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Before our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
We’re just a few hours away, and we’re still about $1,200 short of our goal.
Hi Peter, it’s Pramila.
I’m reaching out one last time before our deadline at midnight. We’re just a few hours away, and we’re still about $1,200 short of our goal.
With AIPAC spending big to meddle in Democratic primaries, we can’t afford to fall short. We need to make sure our people-powered movement has the resources to compete — and to _win._
Can I count on you to pitch in $3 at the link below before midnight?
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-em-20260430-2](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260430-2.fPlkRr&refcode=em20260430-6196&amount=3&t=1&akid=6196%2E420207%2Eo7Q2Wd)**
Thank you, thank you, thank you for your support!
Pramila Jayapal

name: Wiener, Scott
subject: This is my last email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott WIENER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | Peter,

This is my last email before our April deadline.

Next week, ballots start arriving in San Francisco. Every day will become election day. And what we’ve built by midnight tonight will determine how we fight it.

At least one opponent has already poured $5 million of their own money into this race. They want to buy this seat, and the big money flooding in will only ramp up in the weeks ahead.

Our campaign has never relied on personal wealth or hedge fund money. What we have instead is people from across San Francisco who are stepping up to back us because they believe in the work we will do together in Congress.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: A personal request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hi Derek, I know
you hear from a lot of folks, so I have a personal request:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6445?t=1004&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]Will you chip in a few dollars to support my work in the Senate?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22026_abs_em.dQeZoR&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1005&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]PITCH IN NOW

My top priority is to make a real difference for the working people in our
country who are facing higher costs at the grocery store, on their rent,
and at the gas pump. Not to mention their healthcare.

Those aren’t just empty words. Fighting to make the economy work for
people again is why I get up in the morning, and why you sent me to the
Senate.

I’m hearing from countless families worried about making ends meet in a
dire economic situation. And I’m doing something about it — working to
bring down energy costs, to lower the price of healthcare, to stop Trump’s
illegal tariffs, and to build more housing.

Donald Trump and Senate Republicans are making this work much more
difficult. Every day, there’s a new update on how they’re cutting jobs,
slashing healthcare and food assistance, and disrupting the crucial work
to help hard-working families just get by. And Trump’s Iran war is making
us all pay more for gas, groceries, and more.

It’s immoral and unjust. And it doesn’t have to be this way.

And while they destroy our economy and get us involved in stupid wars with
no authorization, they distract us with chaos and nonsense on Fox News —
including personal attacks against me from Donald Trump and Tulsi Gabbard.

Here’s what you need to know: Trump will try to distract us with his lies
and smears. But that can’t stop us from holding him and his cronies
accountable and making sure voters know the real consequences of their
destructive agenda.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/6445?t=1006&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]Your support helps me deliver and hold the GOP to account for their
actions. So please, chip in a few dollars to help me get the job done. I
have a fundraising deadline tonight, and your donation goes a long way.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q22026_abs_em.WPzzDc&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1007&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q22026_abs_em.7_UuVu&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1008&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q22026_abs_em.6k0Bvh&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1009&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q22026_abs_em.0j5o2u&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1010&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q22026_abs_em.JGm440&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1011&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=q22026_abs_em.nSz-K7&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&t=1012&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you,

Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22026_abs_em.dQeZoR&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5781?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20260430_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]DONATE MONTHLY

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1002&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]www.adamschiff.com | [ mailto:contact@adamschiff.com ]contact@adamschiff.com | [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=1003&akid=9773%2E5257348%2ECTK_Cv ]Privacy Policy

Here's our earlier message in case you missed it: Just as we warned she would yesterday, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez voted with MAGA to hand Donald Trump **_warrantless surveillance authority over American citizens for the rest of his term_**. At this point the betrayals are so routine we could set a calendar by them. So instead of relitigating what has become a depressing and vicious cycle, let's talk about the cold numbers of this race. Our own polling from last fall showed that when voters in this district learned about Marie's voting record, her support dropped by a third and nearly half of WA-03 already viewed her unfavorably. That was before 2026. Before she voted to fund ICE three more times while the agents who murdered Alex Pretti and Renee Good are still on the street. Before she handed Trump warrantless surveillance authority. Before she refused to condemn an illegal war. Whatever her numbers looked like in November, they are undoubtedly worse now. She is not a vulnerable incumbent at this point. **She is a lame duck who has not figured out she is done yet.** The persuadable independents and frustrated Democrats who put Marie in that seat will not show up for her again. **If she is the nominee, this seat goes full MAGA. Full stop.**
---
[ **KEEP WA-03 BLUE** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv6r8GR7zKbLdKY8JcRsBH840V41lhbochMlwyPNoidW46OgOnGQ5TK5l5xxs17KOR9331mieMlc10GnYKQcrYm2-Pr5R6QQqziTVj89j5XwrblmbiZlFgFFRKxh15Z0MoOI92D7xKoN-VRZMf6a5lF5obrtl_Ze4gXsEpsgXo7c1HQMzXtr8bjv-MZbw0ksV3JXceNYZOgR7s-XuoUcBmQ2Hl9-InAZsSV8_5rIqpf43U9D0PznyFHuLPWjXLSmY-UuwvEWRKZcuatsg2-9BSosr5OgkDuRd5xvGyUVP5UpQ/4q9/sJt6bEv3QAaKGDmpdukKaQ/h2/h001.7Jg2V3lFlCORUnv4onNhi1ty9OWhjLeoLW3kQlnDVb4)

It's what happens when a candidate spends two years torching her own base, then asks them to show up in November anyway. Which means we don't have a minute to lose. **So we 've made the commitment to bring on field staff now to get in front of every voter in the district who is done with Marie and needs to hear about us.** We're rolling the dice a bit, but we have to believe that enough of you out there are also committed to electing a true, working class Democrat who will fight for everyone in WA-03. That means we can't afford to come up short. We still need to raise another $3,500 tonight to hit our April goal, with less than 90 days from the first ballots dropping in this race. name: Katie Porter
subject: Why I’m writing to you tonight:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Dear Peter,
At midnight tonight, we reach the end of April. With just over a month until the primary election, what we raise now could make all the difference.
I’ll explain more about how we’ll put your resources to work for this campaign, but if you’re with me, use this link to chip in before midnight: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260430_3_ak?refcode=em20260430-41245](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260430_3_ak.J8s5UG&refcode=em20260430-41245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=41245%2E3422442%2EqwL7k_)**
In these final weeks, our campaign is going all out to reach voters across California. We launched our **Whiteboard Warriors Tour** to meet working people and share how I’m going to fight for them as governor.
We’re also ramping up our digital program with social media videos and ads to reach people online. But doing this well takes serious resources, and I’m counting on supporters like you to help fuel our work.
We can’t afford to wait. My billionaire opponent has spent over $147 million on his campaign, and other candidates continue to cash corporate PAC checks.
I’ve always relied on grassroots donors to power this campaign because I’ll never sell out my values for corporate money. That’s why I’m writing to you tonight.
Peter, I would be honored if you chipped in $5 or whatever makes sense to our campaign to help us reach our $100,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. Use this link to chip in: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20260430_3_ak?refcode=em20260430-41245](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260430_3_ak.J8s5UG&refcode=em20260430-41245&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=41245%2E3422442%2EqwL7k_)**

Katie Porter

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
**From:** Marie Gluesenkamp Perez
**Subject:** The final day of the month

Peter,

I'll be direct: today is the final day of the month, and we're still significantly short of where we need to be.

That matters because national extremist attacks are escalating across the country. In the last two weeks, Donald Trump endorsed my opponent, and the Congressional Leadership Fund reserved its largest ad buy in history — including millions of dollars targeting our district.

They are coming for this seat.

I'm not going to pretend otherwise. This race was already going to be close. Now it's going to get more expensive, more nationalized, and more crowded with people who don't live here trying to decide who represents Southwest Washington.

I'm going to keep doing this job the way I always have: listening first, doing the work, and staying loyal to the people here at home.

But I need help before midnight.

[**_Can you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can today to help us close this gap and keep this seat in local hands?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130521354/618061076/2110417857?amount=7&refcode=MGP_EM_FR_260430_3_3&refcode2=4a3a1e5e-0645-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTkyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YTNhMWU1ZS0wNjQ1LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pJsWW1tAlcbykZHOxAC81RcSAvhhZrHHS0mS1Alj5mM=)

I don't take asking lightly. But this is one of those moments when early support really does matter.

Thank you for being in this with me.

Marie

subject: At the end of April
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Chris Pappas for Senate

Our latest end-of-month deadline is in just a few hours, so this is the last time
I’ll ask:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260430_4.Z0zVUq&refcode=em20260430-4&t=1003&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Will you chip in
$5 (or $10!) before midnight tonight to help
my team meet our critical April fundraising goal?

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260430_4.Z0zVUq&amount=5&refcode=em20260430-4&t=1004&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Donate $5 »

Here are the facts in our race:

* We’re tied in the polls with our opponent John Sununu.
* We’re being outspent by the Republican super PAC.
* And there’s just over six months until Election Day.

But here’s one thing I know for sure: This grassroots team is powerful.
We’ve proven time and time again that New Hampshire can’t be bought.
That’s why I hope I can call on this team again:

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260430_4.Z0zVUq&refcode=em20260430-4&t=1005&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Will you help us reach our April goal before it’s too late? Please make
a donation of $5 or any amount before midnight to help us
meet our end-of-month goal.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260430_4.Z0zVUq&amount=5&refcode=em20260430-4&t=1024&akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1 ]Donate $5 »

Let’s turn this momentum around together.

Thank you,

Chris Pappas

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=6416%2E582294%2E6ksig1

name: The Democrats
subject: Mary, Jon, Sherrod, and more…
body:
---
**Mary Peltola.
Sherrod Brown.
Jon Ossoff.
** Derek, did you see these big names hit your inbox this month? **Each of these Democrats have personally reached out to you to ask for help hitting this month’s fundraising goal.** You’ve also heard from Roger Lau, Andie Levien, Dan Freeman, Abby Boyle, and Emily Profeta — team members at the DNC — explaining the important work they do and how your support helps us to do it. [**Our records show that you haven’t chipped in yet, so we’d like another chance to explain why your support ahead of tonight’s end-of-month deadline is so important.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6927_fr&refcode2=6927_22930333_xP8Yt9&akid=6927%2E22930333%2ExP8Yt9) Here’s the thing: Fewer than one percent of people receiving this email will donate. We're asking you to join them today. The DNC is the only organization working around the clock every year to elect Democrats at all levels of government, in every corner of the country, and our work depends on grassroots support. **But our end-of-month deadline is _tonight_ , and we’re still falling behind our $600k goal. So we’re reaching out again — **[**will you join the thousands of other Democrats across the country and pitch in $7 to the DNC today? Every donation goes directly towards organizing across the country, registering voters, and electing Democrats up and down the ballot this year.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6927_fr&refcode2=6927_22930333_xP8Yt9&akid=6927%2E22930333%2ExP8Yt9) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260430_6927_fr&refcode2=6927_22930333_xP8Yt9&akid=6927%2E22930333%2ExP8Yt9)**

| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-eom-april-2026?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em_20260430_6927_fr&refcode2=6927_22930333_xP8Yt9&akid=6927%2E22930333%2ExP8Yt9)**

Thank you,
The Democrats

A prior review made it clear that stronger leadership, greater transparency, and improved trust are needed, and I’m ready to deliver. As a former Mayor and current member of the Board of Supervisors, I oversee a $5.5 billion organization with 5,800 employees and strong financial reserves. I understand that accountability, sound management, and collaboration are essential to delivering reliable public services. As your Chief Elections Officer, I will ensure elections are secure, efficient, and accessible to all eligible voters, while strengthening transparency and public trust. This is an important moment for our county. With your help, we can build the momentum needed to win. name: Ashley Moody
subject: Some extremely alarming news to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Moody for Florida
body:
This is a man vehemently opposed to everything we stand for, singularly obsessed with destroying the America First Agenda, and determined to make every Trump supporter pay the price.

| | | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkL3u2yAUR58Gb1iAwXYGhkqRt3SoKnW0CFwcVD6sC06at68ctQ_wX386Ojr3_rqtNxNiyNt3k0Bj8yvWtZYE8KchJIhvEw2mkLcMr7oKJkbKFGX85HjntLPOcNuB5tM0jeIyy6l76FlKMw0gRs-9uTA3jSCUVf4iZzvfmeqCPlVMMc4Zk0z1Us1ScW-YEHKY7UgkMxGw9Qj7cY_BmtxM_e0LWuhtSV3Uj9b2SoZvRCxELBXsgdC_QkZwJ0HEkkpxb-oLUh8LBmeIWHx4Av0cRUP2gLnQ-ijY1p3uZSfDgqcIQ97IcG14ABHj0dLaLBmuP34u9H_4v92W3CA3MlwhmRB5h9rtrxBjqONEJNvO9VPcvv7fpxZ_AwAA__-zJoqA)
---
Friend, this is not a drill... **A shocking new poll just dropped showing Deep State conspirator Alexander Vindman within just three points of flipping Florida in our must-win Senate special election.** [**Three points. That's within the margin of error. In other words, this race is effectively tied. Let that sink in.**](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkL3u2yAUR58Gb1iAwXYGhkqRt3SoKnW0CFwcVD6sC06at68ctQ_wX386Ojr3_rqtNxNiyNt3k0Bj8yvWtZYE8KchJIhvEw2mkLcMr7oKJkbKFGX85HjntLPOcNuB5tM0jeIyy6l76FlKMw0gRs-9uTA3jSCUVf4iZzvfmeqCPlVMMc4Zk0z1Us1ScW-YEHKY7UgkMxGw9Qj7cY_BmtxM_e0LWuhtSV3Uj9b2SoZvRCxELBXsgdC_QkZwJ0HEkkpxb-oLUh8LBmeIWHx4Av0cRUP2gLnQ-ijY1p3uZSfDgqcIQ97IcG14ABHj0dLaLBmuP34u9H_4v92W3CA3MlwhmRB5h9rtrxBjqONEJNvO9VPcvv7fpxZ_AwAA__-zJoqA) The man who abused his position at the highest levels of our government, who drove the Trump impeachment from inside the National Security Council, who wasted millions of taxpayer dollars trying to bring down a duly elected president — that man is now knocking on the door of the United States Senate. In Florida. In President Trump's home state. Vindman has made no secret of what drives him. He's not running out of some deep love of Florida — he just moved here! This is a man vehemently opposed to everything we stand for, singularly obsessed with destroying the America First Agenda, and determined to make every Trump supporter pay the price. _**This is not ambition. This is cold, hard revenge – and now he has the money to make it real.**_ **Vindman has raised over $8 million** — radical left-wing cash pouring in from the most extreme Trump-hating mega-donors in the country. Every dollar is fuel for his revenge campaign. And here's what makes this even more alarming: Democrats don't just have a candidate — they have momentum. In the last month alone, Democrats flipped three Florida seats. In a major upset, they flipped a Trump +11 district that includes Mar-a-Lago. **National forecasters have quietly downgraded Florida from "Safe Republican,"** and in the last nine special elections nationwide, Democrats ran an average of 17 points higher than Kamala Harris. _**They smell political blood.**_ Make no mistake. This race for Marco Rubio's former Senate seat is a special election – and special elections are unpredictable by nature. The normal rules don't apply. Turnout is volatile, outside money pours in fast, and a motivated opposition can flip a race that looks safe on paper. name: The Flyover
subject: Congress Ends Shutdown, Tariff Refunds, and a $100 Hot Dog
body:
The House [voted unanimously Thursday](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2K9CAYRq_GdAn65sfPwuJr0s22W4rR19HF0UGdyNz9koW9gu0eeODAOZ83ddMhhnT_0A-UzWWVsNeIrWFRJqd7wVox2Vr9q9ncU9MlOAUUtpGuI2XK6hDfahmsdIiA84CScc43EIKJwUtqtMB_mvINrDHOHsvh5kMIhtxsjh1DkBeNrpQxSle2TavhfF41AM4GmJvJQtGGlsv0lUNqHl185xPLZPJjiNK39qxk_k9gJ7D33idz1Mvi-gns1ySwW1_HX4nR51fF8cwNCexDkfbZQ4yhbpws9P7QIf7A25-KnBK-AwAA__8F3Ha5) to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security, ending the longest partial government shutdown in U.S. history at 76 days.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7FuwyAURb8GtlgPMMYeGLp4S9eOiMLDpsUQAY2Vv69S9Q8y33uOdD6u5mpjinl7twfqHorJeLaEvWM1ruStYmuYfWv7T_flzN3WGAwHPl1AXoAZb2N6mJF6HRA5CoqaKaUmvixsobsGtgTvvJrt7FBCUMKz4N3MFgGz-xQ06qcNJDAGINk0SKeUkJZzFI6zIMgI6GMvdfgqMfcdQ3qUO9bBlYMmvfd-I-KN8JXw1deYv9OR-3MkfP2_0qr97YwpxTYpMsJ22Jj--P5S9F3z3wAAAP__xo9r8g) | |
# Friday, May 1, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1931, President Herbert Hoover symbolically dedicated New York City's [Empire State Building](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u6yAUAOCnwVssfoyJB4YrRd5ypU7pZhE42KciEMFxIr991b5CX-Abvtt1uTpMmNf_7gGWYlkyvFsCIqiLL3mt0Brk0Nq2UyjvTK5iXCSX44nrExdLcJiOZeiCjQASVAdWGGNGOU1i6jbr78oYdQfhx7M4Gxm1NtpNYorejMN56tD-aFxzITjXYuy1N0ZpJyUoL0VUbOAQkErtvwpm2iCmo7yg9r48umQ3omdj6h-TM5PzUXba-zswOYv19rlf0gdiY2qO4GivwNSlba5C6KoNzzemhG00bODrw2H6JelPDy8rvwMAAP__8BNxIA) by pressing a button from the White House to turn on its lights, though someone else flipped the switches in New York. One year ago, we hit "record" on something new, and it's grown into something incredible. Today, _The Flyover Podcast_ reaches more than 1.4 million listeners each month, delivering clear, direct, and unbiased coverage of the stories that matter most. What started as a simple idea is now part of daily routines across the country, and we couldn't have done it without you. As we head into year two, we're excited to bring you new content, new formats, and new ways to stay informed. We're just getting started. Tune in to today's _Podcast Extra_ stories, featuring a new form of "genetic cholesterol" that could become the next big breakthrough in preventing heart attacks. [Listen here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzzFuwyAUgOHTwBYLHgbsgaFLtnTtiDA8YioCEdC4vn3VXqEH-H_p-7jZm0s5lfu7e6AZsdqCR884Bjbra7k37B1L6H3_GqEeZbiWogUG6sLkhXEbXMqnnWkwERFQUDRca61gXflKd8PUJpVauAp6RhAbLE6JyNYNl2V13tNkfm9MMs4Zk1xN0mstpANA4YFHQWaGIY3aps-aytgx5rO-sE2-Pmg2-xjPTsQbgSuBa8OtuRKmfBK4PmvA79Ecp82E55FyTl1pMrP7w6X8149_oV8GfgIAAP__MHFrHQ). Temperatures are starting to climb, and it doesn't take much to feel the difference. Warmer days, more time outside, and suddenly hydration matters a lot more. [That's why today's partner, LMNT](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykj7FuwyAURb8GtlgPMMYeGLp4S9eOiMLDpsUQAY2Vv69S9Q8y33uOdD6u5mpjinl7twfqHorJeLaEvWM1ruStYmuYfWv7T_flzN3WGAwHPl1AXoAZb2N6mJF6HRA5CoqaKaUmvixsobsGtgTvvJrt7FBCUMKz4N3MFgGz-xQ06qcNJDAGINk0SKeUkJZzFI6zIMgI6GMvdfgqMfcdQ3qUO9bBlYMmvfd-I-KN8JXw1deYv9OR-3MkfP2_0qr97YwpxTYpMsJ22Jj--P5S9F3z3wAAAP__xo9r8g), has become something we reach for regularly this time of year.
|
---
## Trump Signs Bill, Ends DHS Shutdown
President Trump on Thursday [signed legislation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDkO2zAURE8jdRS4aLEKFmnUOW1KgSE_qR9wEchvK759IF8h7QwwmPd-PfenwYg5_DQJNPmyZ7haBCKouy05VGgNsmvteJErVyZT0e-Sy5nxiXGxO4Pxs4-90x5AgupBi2VZZrmuYu0P_Vs-1snNdlxno9S4jOAfQs4Pp4QFz1WP-l7jExeC80nMw2SXRU1GSlBWCq-6kYNDKnX4UzDTAT5-yhvqYEvqoz6IztapH53cOrld1zX48vemuPtObmeJSGhbJzeqr3SyG4e5o7FYcmDZEJZsIssYDkqmAsOUMNRvziD7Ui0kyMQaYYwsgid2mBwwh75qd14YI7Z56UYeksH4_UX_JfOt5b8AAAD__5FKjP8) ending the longest partial government shutdown in U.S. history at 75 days, hours after the House agreed by voice vote to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security. The bill reopens DHS components, including the TSA, Coast Guard, FEMA, and Secret Service, through Sept. 30. DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin had warned [funding would dry up](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2K9CAYRq_GdAn65sfPwuJr0s22W4rR19HF0UGdyNz9koW9gu0eeODAOZ83ddMhhnT_0A-UzWWVsNeIrWFRJqd7wVox2Vr9q9ncU9MlOAUUtpGuI2XK6hDfahmsdIiA84CScc43EIKJwUtqtMB_mvINrDHOHsvh5kMIhtxsjh1DkBeNrpQxSle2TavhfF41AM4GmJvJQtGGlsv0lUNqHl185xPLZPJjiNK39qxk_k9gJ7D33idz1Mvi-gns1ySwW1_HX4nR51fF8cwNCexDkfbZQ4yhbpws9P7QIf7A25-KnBK-AwAA__8F3Ha5) by Friday, putting paychecks at risk for tens of thousands of workers. Funding for ICE and the Border Patrol was left out after Democrats objected and will be handled separately through [budget reconciliation](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFvgzAQBeBfYzbQ-YwhDB66sKVrR-TYZ3Bl7AhfgvLvq1TqL-j8pO_pva_rcrUxxbx-2p0Mh7JkOmsiZjoWV_J6UK2Ufa3bg305M9sjhgUBhxZ0C3LxNqbX0jfeBCIk1ZCR4zgOOE1yajYjwamgvUNUg59kQOX0zTvvLlJOF9BNNG8NNEgJoOXQaTeOSltEUg5lUKIH8pHL0X2XmHmjkF7lSUfnyt4kszHfq1AfAmeB83mencs39w4Fzm9a4Ay9wFmBwPlvU-u32nK1bXhkH_Pabbyn5jD-fsaUYh1G0cO625h-a_hf3zwN_gQAAP__eqt27A), a process Republicans can pass without votes from Democrats.
## Oil, Gas Prices Hit Four-Year Highs
Brent crude topped $126 a barrel Thursday, a [four-year high](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAURb8Gd2-EwR6HwsWsInebJkVKC8PDfhHmjYAdNH8fOb-w3b260tXR-fO5flqKlPZf9sS5Bl4TthKxVsyr47RnLAWTL-X4qp5bqjZTWJVUd5AjyH71luJ7HTo_B0SFusO5n6bprozpTXfMxhk7mB9Be9TGoDFydFs_jYhh85vBjubrTY6y76Uc-_ttdNOkR6sUaqf6oMUg0VPlfPvLlOqBIb75hfnm-OzifNT6LEI_hFqEWlprt7OkaxNqwQTOCrWcnPB9dceJzyvtkTcbgSnCM5NDOKgWGOCNNsNB-wGcwHFymBNwgK8ClG2CZjNgcTbaSpyEWmyGx0OpkT42oRd25IX--XEZxVZ-Y352efbPRjFSuU9ikPtpKf5nr98S_prVvwAAAP__46CWtA), as the Iran war enters its third month, with the crucial Strait of Hormuz shipping lane effectively closed. U.S. gas prices climbed to $4.30 a gallon on average, the highest [since July 2022](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAUhJ8Gd1hw_ENcUNzGXW67pYXh2D4RhghIUN5-5d1H2G5GI41mvq_7cjfkKez_zYm6bHEJWLPHUjAtNoY9Yc4YXM7Hq7hYQzGJtgUEjFwMXMjFGfKfpW-c3hABuwa1VEqNME1yag4tp-mmJtVZa610or-t1gyb3NQqOos4NKSvNjEIKYUY5NgOVqluMADYWZBbx3qBjkpM7SNSKAdu_hPfmFobz8bro5RnZt0_BjODudba2jVfL66cwXxJBvOaMBRu08shj-T5M5FFXk0qdCI_aD_4bnL0FH4d5sIzBYv88fIfDgKAwdwk7Z6VvKc8KtaL_TTkf4aUP9F7a_gOAAD__y5_hcU), with drivers paying $1.32 more per gallon than before the war began Feb. 28, according to AAA data. California leads the nation at $6.01 a gallon, while Hawaii, Nevada, Oregon, and Washington also averaged above $5. [See your state's price here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykjz2O8yAUAE9jd7Eez_zEBcXXpMvXbokIPGxWBCIgQbn9KnuF7WdGmq-rudqYYt7_2zvpHorJNFqi3qkaV_JeqTXKvrXj2X0Zudsag0FAeQJxAma8jelt-Ox1IEJaZ9JMKSVx29g2H1opHkQ4o3Renm-SOxDbjYPyTpwpBJij_tRAAGMAgslFOKVWYRFpdcjCOnEgH3upy3eJuR8U0ru8qC6u3Oekj94fbVr_TXiZ8DLGWHbbbk_v3x9gwsuz2blq_xgxpdikmjjsdxvTr9__NP3S-BMAAP__bftrag).
## California's High-Speed Train Costs Soar
The cost of California's high-speed rail project [has surged to $231 billion](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGS4yAQRL9GynDBIIl1QHCJs730QhWGwZotDCpmtFr__ZXvFy7qpKur3_vzuX4GKlQfv8MTveS2Vjy5oAj2Nbb66MiMNTFvh6R2Vgmd8goaFqVnpc2aApXXOo3JZ0RAO6I3zrkFrldzHTdvP6YUkvtYIkwJIS85pDzP1jm4YkY9kn-v6Vkbo_VslsscnbNzAEAbwWQ7TBoTSeuXr0ZVNszl1b6xX2J7jsVvIjsP9tcAtwFu53lecvu5H0wVmd-dAW65_ag3mNpbIaHIA9xiKJRbrxTURo9N8Y6YVA9U1N7bF0ZR3EJnBdbc1dk6i9qPe6GoqOYeWPoR5eiocqDyzoPVRiytv8bu035SKcSLGyb9eAYq__7Kf0n-9vA3AAD__yI8lpE), up from an original $33 billion estimate, prompting one state lawmaker to call it the _" most wasteful government project in probably world history."_ The project, first funded in 2008, was supposed to connect San Francisco and Los Angeles by 2020. Its scope has since been scaled back to a 171-mile Central Valley corridor between Merced and Bakersfield. Expected ticket prices have nearly [doubled from early estimates](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O3CAURJ8Gd1hw8W9BsVHkbtOkSGlhuLZvhMEBdp19-8h5ha89MxqNzq_n_DTkKWw_zIG6rHEOeGWPpWCabQxbwpwxuJz3V3HxCsUkWmcQ0HHRciFnZ8h_5qZyekUEVBVq2fd9B-Mox2rXYMUy9Lguw4KDAtPYwXRWuBbU6Ba3VKTvNdEKKYVoZVe3tu9VawBQWZCrYo1ARyWm-nekUHZc_Se-MdU2HpXXeylnZurBYGIwXddVHzncGYMJA3_lm6IpOyYGU4lnLjER3tgaT2tMgQzfadt5PhEdT4Y8PxNZ5MVsHP-ePjrMvEQOSvKFvKcYGEwm8ccDQPzBg6kpWnJMff92y8Qr_8R0Vkm787r7uetZI7bDkP9_u3zJ9VvDvwAAAP__cR-VbQ). Ridership projections have also fallen sharply, from roughly 95 million annual passengers by 2030, cited in early planning documents, to long‐term Authority estimates of about 36 million by 2060. GOP state Sen. Tony Strickland and Independent Rep. Kevin Kiley are among those calling for the project to be scrapped entirely, predicting the next governor will abandon it given California's ongoing budget deficits.
* * *

clean_body: The House to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security, ending the longest partial government shutdown in U.S. history at 76 days. | | | | | | Friday, May 1, 2026 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1931, President Herbert Hoover symbolically dedicated New York City's by pressing a button from the White House to turn on its lights, though someone else flipped the switches in New York. One year ago, we hit "record" on something new, and it's grown into something incredible. Today, The Flyover Podcast reaches more than 1.4 million listeners each month, delivering clear, direct, and unbiased coverage of the stories that matter most. What started as a simple idea is now part of daily routines across the country, and we couldn't have done it without you. As we head into year two, we're excited to bring you new content, new formats, and new ways to stay informed. We're just getting started. Tune in to today's Podcast Extra stories, featuring a new form of "genetic cholesterol" that could become the next big breakthrough in preventing heart attacks. . Temperatures are starting to climb, and it doesn't take much to feel the difference. Warmer days, more time outside, and suddenly hydration matters a lot more. , has become something we reach for regularly this time of year. | Trump Signs Bill, Ends DHS Shutdown President Trump on Thursday ending the longest partial government shutdown in U.S. history at 75 days, hours after the House agreed by voice vote to fund most of the Department of Homeland Security. The bill reopens DHS components, including the TSA, Coast Guard, FEMA, and Secret Service, through Sept. 30. DHS Secretary Markwayne Mullin had warned by Friday, putting paychecks at risk for tens of thousands of workers. Funding for ICE and the Border Patrol was left out after Democrats objected and will be handled separately through , a process Republicans can pass without votes from Democrats. Oil, Gas Prices Hit Four-Year Highs Brent crude topped $126 a barrel Thursday, a , as the Iran war enters its third month, with the crucial Strait of Hormuz shipping lane effectively closed. U.S. gas prices climbed to $4.30 a gallon on average, the highest , with drivers paying $1.32 more per gallon than before the war began Feb. 28, according to AAA data. California leads the nation at $6.01 a gallon, while Hawaii, Nevada, Oregon, and Washington also averaged above $5. . California's High-Speed Train Costs Soar The cost of California's high-speed rail project , up from an original $33 billion estimate, prompting one state lawmaker to call it the " most wasteful government project in probably world history." The project, first funded in 2008, was supposed to connect San Francisco and Los Angeles by 2020. Its scope has since been scaled back to a 171-mile Central Valley corridor between Merced and Bakersfield. Expected ticket prices have nearly . Ridership projections have also fallen sharply, from roughly 95 million annual passengers by 2030, cited in early planning documents, to long‐term Authority estimates of about 36 million by 2060. GOP state Sen. Tony Strickland and Independent Rep. Kevin Kiley are among those calling for the project to be scrapped entirely, predicting the next governor will abandon it given California's ongoing budget deficits.
